title: Simply Performance +
description: The best and only performance-pack you will ever need.
body:
# What does Simply Performance do?
This Modpack is designed to deliver ultra‑high performance for minecraft with shader and most other mods support. It combines some of the most powerful optimization mods available (Sodium, Modernfix MVUS, Lithium, C2m etc.), carefully selected and configured to ensure smoother gameplay, faster loading times, and reduced lag. It also reduces crashes and fixes bugs with not enough crashes and debugify.

![Minecraft Backround Simply Performance Logo and Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cd81b831ab2c0792e911e05292d3137e1924b20.jpeg)

Pictures made by AI
